name: tersh
description: Local terminal CLI for connecting to Termix-managed SSH hosts.

scripts.check: node --check bin/tersh.js && node --check src/auth-client.js && node --check src/command-runner.js && node --check src/config-store.js && node --check src/host-discovery.js && node --check src/http-json.js && node --check src/prompts.js && node --check src/tls-policy.js && node --check src/token-storage.js
